studyName: Research in Adaptive Interests, Skills, and Environment

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table reports each subject's age, ethnicity, self-reported race, self assessment of financial stability, and responses to a questionnaire monitoring future drug, alcohol, and tobacco use.

variables.name: AGE_YEARS
variables.description: Age in years at time of sample collection

variables.name: DEMSES
variables.description: Question: In your opinion, how is your family doing financially?

variables.name: HISPANIC
variables.description: Question: Are you of Hispanic, Latino, or Spanish origin?

tables.description: This sample attributes data table reports each sample's body site of origin, collection age, and  analyte type.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: The analyte type of the sample (ex. DNA, RNA)

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_AGE
variables.description: Age at which sample was collected

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

tables.description: This subject consent data table reports each subject's subject ID, consent, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Registered consent groups (Data Use Limitations (DUL)) as determined by submitters' Institutional Review Boards (IRB) or equivalent body.

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Self-reported sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to individual and pooled sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
